word.definition: Rectify is a formal word meaning “to correct (something that is wrong).”

sports_fact.text: On May 13, 1958, Stan Musial doubled at Wrigley Field for career hit number 3,000 — he'd been held out of the starting lineup so the milestone could happen in St. Louis, then delivered it as a pinch hitter anyway.

market.headline: Stock Market Today: Chip Stocks Bounce Back, Lifting Nasdaq to New Record
market.summary: Wholesale prices flash another warning sign on inflation

quote.text: In this life mercy and forgiveness is our way and evermore leadeth us to grace. And by the tempest and the sorrow that we fall into on our part, we be often dead as to man’s doom in earth; but in the sight of God the soul that shall be saved was never dead, nor ever shall be.
quote.author: Julian of Norwich

history.text: Ecuador gains its independence from Gran Colombia.
